;krk;kr ds fy, NwV dh ;kstuk] tSlkfd fj;k;r djkj esa fn;k x;k gS] okf.kfT;d izpkyu dh rkjh[k ls de& ls&de nl fnu igys nks LFkkuh; lekpkj i=ksa esa ¼ftuesa ls ,d LFkkuh; Hkk"kk dk gksxk½ izdkf”kr djsxk ftlesa bl vf/klwpuk ds izko/kkuksa ds vuqlkj okf.kfT;d lqpkyu dh rkjh[k dk Hkh mYys[k fd;k tk,xkA bl vf/klwpuk ds vuqlkj la”kksf/kr Qhl dk izHkkoh :i nsus ls nl fnu igys Hkh ,sls lkj dks nksgjk;k tk,xkA [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@431@lhvks@08&09@thlh&fot;okM+k ¼fot;okM+k&fpydkywjhisV½ chvksVh] vyds”k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th December, 2014 S.O. 3320(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India, in the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) number S.O. 760(E), dated the 18th March, 2009, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— In the said notification, under the SCHEDULE Existing para Shall be substituted as (i) The Concessionaire shall collect and retain the fees on mechanical vehicles specified in column (2) of the Table below, for the use of the said stretch at the rate of base fee specified in Column (3) of the said Table. (i) The Concessionaire shall collect and retain the fees on mechanical vehicles specified in column (2) of the Table below, for the use of the said stretch at the rate of base fee specified in Column (3) of the said Table for a length of 82.500 Km. (ii) The fee shall be collected at fee Plaza located at Km.416.8 (Kaza). (ii) The fee shall be collected at fee Plaza located at Km.416.8 (Kaza) for a length of 82.500 Km. Note No. 8: The concessionaire shall publish substance of this notification in two local newspapers (one of which shall be vernacular language), which shall also state the date of commercial operation as per the provisions of this notification, at least ten days prior to the date of commercial operation and such substance shall also be repeated, ten days prior to giving effect to revised fees. Note No. 8: The concessionaire shall publish substance of this notification and the scheme of discount to frequent users and Local Traffic, as provided in the Concession Agreement, in two local newspapers (one of which shall be vernacular language), which shall also state the date of commercial operation as per the provisions of this notification, at least ten days prior to the date of commercial operation. Such substance shall also be repeated, ten days prior to giving effect to revised Fees as per this notification. [F. No NHAI/13013/431/CO/08-09/GC-Vijaywada (Vijaywada–Chilkaluripet) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
